Lead Exchange Engine

HNI WORLD OS > Legalnomics > Lead Exchange Engine

Demand Engine Geo Routed Subscription Ready

Legal Demand Marketplace and Assignment Layer

This engine converts public legal demand into structured leads, routes them by geography and specialization, and allows advocates, firms and notaries to receive, buy, claim or manage relevant opportunities.

Lead Buying Geo Routing Advocate Match Junior Allocation Premium Visibility Conversion Flow
